ingredients.item:
ONIONS
3 large red onions (1¾ pounds, or 800 g), cut in half, then thinly sliced into half-moons (use a sharp knife, mandoline, or food processor with a slicer attachment)
2 tablespoons sumac
ingredients.original:
ONIONS
3 large red onions (1¾ pounds, or 800 g), cut in half, then thinly sliced into half-moons (use a sharp knife, mandoline, or food processor with a slicer attachment)
2 tablespoons sumac

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil

ingredients.item: 2½ teaspoons seven spice
ingredients.original: 2½ teaspoons seven spice

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon ground cumin

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons sumac
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons sumac

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons olive oil

ingredients.item: 6 bone-in, skin-on chicken leg quarters (4½ to 5½ pounds, or 2 to 2.5 kg), excess fat trimmed
ingredients.original: 6 bone-in, skin-on chicken leg quarters (4½ to 5½ pounds, or 2 to 2.5 kg), excess fat trimmed

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
2 teaspoons olive oil
¼ cup pine nuts (35 g) or slivered almonds (30 g)
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING AND SERVING
2 teaspoons olive oil
¼ cup pine nuts (35 g) or slivered almonds (30 g)

ingredients.item: 2 large taboon or lavash bread (14 inches, or 35 cm; see Note (or substitute 6 of any other 8-inch, or 20-cm, flatbread)
ingredients.original: 2 large taboon or lavash bread (14 inches, or 35 cm; see Note (or substitute 6 of any other 8-inch, or 20-cm, flatbread)

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons sumac
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons sumac

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 Preheat the oven to 400°F (205°C) and place a rack in the middle.
ingredients.original: 1 Preheat the oven to 400°F (205°C) and place a rack in the middle.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE ONIONS: Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper. Add the onions to the middle of the sheet pan with the 2 tablespoons sumac, 1 teaspoon salt, and ¼ cup (60 ml) oil. Mix well to thoroughly coat the onions. Spread the onions in a single layer, covering the pan’s full surface area.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE ONIONS: Line a large, rimmed sheet pan with parchment paper. Add the onions to the middle of the sheet pan with the 2 tablespoons sumac, 1 teaspoon salt, and ¼ cup (60 ml) oil. Mix well to thoroughly coat the onions. Spread the onions in a single layer, covering the pan’s full surface area.

ingredients.item: 3 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a small bowl, mix together the 2 teaspoons salt, pepper, seven spice, cumin, and 3 tablespoons sumac with the 2 tablespoons oil and the lemon juice to create a thick paste.
ingredients.original: 3 TO MAKE THE CHICKEN: In a small bowl, mix together the 2 teaspoons salt, pepper, seven spice, cumin, and 3 tablespoons sumac with the 2 tablespoons oil and the lemon juice to create a thick paste.

ingredients.item: 4 Evenly slather the spice paste all over the chicken, gently massaging it into each leg and working the paste under the skin as well. Place the chicken on the sheet pan on top of the onions.
ingredients.original: 4 Evenly slather the spice paste all over the chicken, gently massaging it into each leg and working the paste under the skin as well. Place the chicken on the sheet pan on top of the onions.

ingredients.item: 5 Place the sheet pan in the oven on the middle rack and bake the chicken for 45 to 50 minutes, until cooked through. (Check that the chicken is white on the inside and the juices run clear.) The onions at the edges of the pan will start to caramelize; this is normal and will add a lot of flavor. Broil the chicken for 3 to 4 minutes until golden brown.
ingredients.original: 5 Place the sheet pan in the oven on the middle rack and bake the chicken for 45 to 50 minutes, until cooked through. (Check that the chicken is white on the inside and the juices run clear.) The onions at the edges of the pan will start to caramelize; this is normal and will add a lot of flavor. Broil the chicken for 3 to 4 minutes until golden brown.

ingredients.item: 6 TO MAKE THE GARNISH: In a small skillet, heat the olive oil over low heat, then add the pine nuts and toast for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden, stirring continuously.
ingredients.original: 6 TO MAKE THE GARNISH: In a small skillet, heat the olive oil over low heat, then add the pine nuts and toast for 2 to 3 minutes, until golden, stirring continuously.

ingredients.item: 7 Remove the chicken from the sheet pan. Take one of the pieces of taboon bread and smear it in the chicken juices in the sheet pan to soak up some of the liquid, then place it on a large platter, juicy side up. Scoop half of the onions from the sheet pan and spread them on the bread in a thin layer. Repeat with the remaining piece of bread, placing it on another platter and adding the remaining onions on top. Place 3 chicken quarters on top of each piece of bread.
ingredients.original: 7 Remove the chicken from the sheet pan. Take one of the pieces of taboon bread and smear it in the chicken juices in the sheet pan to soak up some of the liquid, then place it on a large platter, juicy side up. Scoop half of the onions from the sheet pan and spread them on the bread in a thin layer. Repeat with the remaining piece of bread, placing it on another platter and adding the remaining onions on top. Place 3 chicken quarters on top of each piece of bread.

ingredients.item: 8 Garnish with a dusting of the 2 tablespoons sumac and sprinkle the toasted almonds and chopped parsley over everything. Serve each person a piece of chicken with some bread and onions along with yogurt and salad.
ingredients.original: 8 Garnish with a dusting of the 2 tablespoons sumac and sprinkle the toasted almonds and chopped parsley over everything. Serve each person a piece of chicken with some bread and onions along with yogurt and salad.
